feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Shmup players are more likely to be psychopaths
entry.content: I have a Bachelor's degree in Psychology. And for fun, I have studied and interviewed various shmup players over the span of a few years. And the conclusion? Shmup players are more likely to have psychopathic traits. I will list them. If I documented this shit online you will find out who I am and I do not want to be harassed. Anyways, I did this for fun. Anyways.. They have lots of emotional detachment when facing hundreds, if not thousands of bullets on screen. And for people chasing big clear

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: hype gaming music
entry.content: what music do you listen to to hype yourself up while gaming, /v/? for me, it's DnB and breakcore (not the -ack!core shit) my current favorites i've got on repeat are: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AxJ sSmty-iM https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=etO q30rF0gE https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iP0 9CvxP0vs need more tunes to match this energy also this can be a videogame music thread, any recent games with good music come out? link or just say the game name and i'll listen

entry.content: FUCKING KEKAROOOO Yeah, it's about time that youtube finally caught up with the rest of them. Take this as a reminder that both YT and 4chan actually are social media platforms.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The disc boycott is dead already
entry.content: >No disc versions for both games >The game and seasons passes are overpriced, ps plus subscribers get a discount >Post did not get ratio'd like their other posts, people whining about discs in the comments are getting bullied. >The ports are not available on xbox and pc. So those versions remain hacked to shit. $39.99 for both games, ps plus subscribers can get it for $19.99 until August 6th. Season Pass for each game is $29.99, ps plus subscribers can get it for $9.89 until August 6th.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1039
entry.content: /acrg/ - Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1039 "What's your type?" Edition Remember to SCREENCAP your links so we can laugh when they delete their posts. Talk about artists or commissioners, mostly the bad ones or those who got under your skin. Share your experiences and get angry with us. For all artists (and commissioners who are close friends with artists) here, beware of: Horu, Pixxy, OkiOppai, Timedwatcher, AnythingGoes, Skitterleaf, kathielnotfound (Jocelyn Jones), and Snoopcrow/jbunny/j6

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The best combination of Active and Passive biomods. Electric Discharge chases aw…
entry.content: The best combination of Active and Passive biomods. Electric Discharge chases away everything except leviathans, Water Secretion + Water Retention gives you infinite water, and Dermal Garden + Slow Metabolism gives you near-infinite food. If you get the fifth slot unlocked Camouflage or Sea Skimmer works, the former makes you invisible when you're still and the latter lets you zoom along any flat surface.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: My nephew is finally at that age, and I need some recommendations for classic or…
entry.content: My nephew is finally at that age, and I need some recommendations for classic or contemporary movies that embody the ideals of masculinity. entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Little story from Uncle Anon
entry.content: 2024, almost 2 exact years ago, Argentina-Buenos Aires. Stunning, beautiful city. Immediatly amazed the architectonic wonders at every street I walked through. Women had bangs, the children looked healthy...but one thing caught my attention: Bolivians/Andeans I already knew besides the huge white population, there still are native-looking argentinians...but they weren't natives at all, since the bolivian indian looks different from the argentinian one. Bolivians are stocky, rough and somehow ani

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /iwg/ Indie Web General
entry.content: Anyanons here use neocities (or anything like that)? Feel free to share your projects here! I need to make some quick changes to my Neocities page before I'll post mine here, but I'm quite curios to know if this isn't just a niche thing of mine lol Old Geocities projects you had are also welcome!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >July 2026 >I am forgotten
entry.content: >July 2026 >I am forgotten

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Rename the "smartphone"
entry.content: If you were to rename the smartphone, what would you call it? I use a smartphone as a music player, a camera, a note taker, a torchlight, an encyclopedia, a clock, a calculator, a dictionary, and a plethora of other functions. But not a phone. I would name it PVMT (portable virtual multi-tool).

entry.title: /g/ Technology: It seems like every other month for the past 5 years I've been hearing about how…
entry.content: It seems like every other month for the past 5 years I've been hearing about how the latest AI models are too heckin powerful and the permanent underclass will be decided by the end of the year. A cynic might argue that AI hype and fearmongering alike are just ploys to keep stock prices high and the bubble from popping. Not me though, I think 25% of all global investment going to AI companies is probably an excellent idea, and very sustainable.

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump airport name change sparks backlash in Florida
entry.content: https://www.aljazeera.com/video/new sfeed/2026/7/9/trump-airport-name-c hange-sparks-backlash-in-florida Palm Beach International Airport has officially been renamed President Donald J. Trump International Airport, with new signage installed throughout the terminal. The move has prompted mixed reactions, with supporters welcoming the tribute while critics argued it was ‘in poor taste.’

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Nuking Physical: Sony wins big while you lose
entry.content: Sony cutting physical means: >saving money by not having to manufacture the discs >gaining profits from whatever they're turning the disc factories into >increasing profit margins by selling digital and cutting out the retailer cut >third parties also make more per sale >possibly pleasing the EPA by using less plastic All the while they will pass exactly ZERO of these benefits onto you. Prices will not reduce, infact they will increase, and Sony will have much better margins on those even higher

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: as a daytrader the markets tells me what to do but as a human I'm wondering what…
entry.content: as a daytrader the markets tells me what to do but as a human I'm wondering what really is a downtrend? On down days the markets go up. On up days the markets go up. What really is a down market where you sell every pop? Markets going down for more than five days? For now I'm speculating up no matter what, but I'm wondering about a real bear market. Perhaps I'm waiting for nothing but me thinking allways bullish makes me wonder, am I a top signal?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I always thought Bioshock opening was a masterpiece in environmental storytellin…
entry.content: I always thought Bioshock opening was a masterpiece in environmental storytelling. All of the trilogy was really good. Are there any other games with an amazing opening like that? Do other 0451 games like Arkane and Eidos Montreal nail it like Bioshock? I hear Dead Space is great too. It was an unofficial System Shock remake according to the devs.

entry.title: /news/ News: Execs Confused and Horrified by the Huge AI Bills After Thinking They Could Replace Workers for Free
entry.content: https://finance.yahoo.com/technolog y/ai/articles/execs-confused-horrif ied-huge-ai-135718505.html?guccount er=1 By now, it's clear that the only way the tech industry can justify the cost of AI is if it replaces vast swaths of the human workforce with machines that run 24/7. The bad news is that this situation has created a world-historic financial market that, by some metrics, is looking worse than the run-up to the Great Depression. The good news is that this future of an AI takeover is looki

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Why do Christians circumcize?
entry.content: Haven't they read the Gospel? >Watch out for those dogs, those evildoers, those mutilators of the flesh. Phillipians 3:2 >For there are many rebellious people, full of meaningless talk and deception, especially those of the circumcision group. They must be silenced, because they are disrupting whole households by teaching things they ought not to teach—and that for the sake of dishonest gain. Titus 1:10-11

entry.title: /news/ News: Ranking Senate Republican Investigating Kash Patel for Corruption
entry.content: https://www.politico.com/live-updat es/2026/07/09/congress/chuck-grassl ey-kash-patel-fbi-spending-00991819 Senate Judiciary Chair Chuck Grassley (R-Iowa) asked FBI Director Kash Patel to provide more details on his use of taxpayer resources in May, Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-Md.) and Sen. Dick Durbin (D-Ill.) revealed in a letter this week, as questions continue to swirl over Patel’s financial stewardship of the agency. The embattled FBI director has long faced allegations that he is using the perks

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Vim is a text editor for Unix that comes with Linux, BSD, and macOS. It is know…
entry.content: >Vim is a text editor for Unix that comes with Linux, BSD, and macOS. It is known to be fast and powerful, partly because it is a small program that can run in a terminal (although it has a graphical interface) >It is mainly because it can be managed entirely without menus or a mouse with a keyboard >resources https://www.vim.org/ (official website) https://www.vim.org/docs.php (official documentation) https://vimdoc.sourceforge.net/vimu m.html (or you can just type vimtutor in your terminal) >f

entry.title: /news/ News: DNA evidence from Charlie Kirk assassination disputed by defendant's lawyers
entry.content: https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation /dna-evidence-from-charlie-kirk-ass assination-disputed-by-defendants-l awyers PROVO, Utah (AP) — Lawyers for the suspect accused of killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk are expected to keep questioning the reliability of DNA testing that prosecutors said links the defendant to the suspected murder weapon when a weeklong hearing continues Wednesday. A member of Tyler Robinson's defense team interrogated a DNA analyst from the FBI on Tuesday about the tec

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Imagine [Apple, 1971] Primal goes pop--personal and useful. The title cut is bot…
entry.content: Imagine [Apple, 1971] Primal goes pop--personal and useful. The title cut is both a hymn for the Movement and a love song for his wife, celebrating a Yokoism and a Marcusianism simultaneously, and "Gimme Some Truth" unites Lennon unmasked with the Lennon of Blunderland wordplay as it provides a rationale for "Jealous Guy," which doesn't need one, and "How Do You Sleep?," which may. "Oh Yoko!" is an instant folk song worthy of Rosie & the Originals and "I Don't Want to Be a Soldier" an instant fo

entry.content: Mike did nothing wrong.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Gatekeeping the Internet
entry.content: >your website doesnt have https >basically every browser and antivirus software blocks your site This made me think. I mean sure I can just point Certbot to my site, but still. When I was a kdi, http only was the default. The Internet getting "safer" has a drawback. In the future hosting websites and making your own apps might be reserved for corpo only. I can sense a "big corporation = safe" mentality going on. In the future they might require that your website/app is already popular and well-k

I know, how stupid of me. Now I am being treated to be exposed to my contacts and family. I don’t know how far they are willing to take it but I don’t know what else to do but to ask for help to you anons. I will leave the number and Reddit handle to do what the community does best when someone is in a bind. I have
